news.t: A Roundup of June's Most Notable ETF Launches
An Exciting ETF for the SpaceX Trade Lifts Off
Ten SpaceX ETFs Launch as SPCX Hits Market
Direxion Debuts Daily SpaceX Bull 2X ETF
Liftoff for 2X Exposure to SpaceX as Direxion Launches LOFF
These SpaceX Funds Are for Active—and Brave—Traders Only

overview.description: The Direxion Daily SpaceX Bull 2X ETF (LOFF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Space Exploration Technologies Corp. Class A (NASDAQ: SPCX), through derivatives such as swaps. LOFF was launched on Jun 15, 2026 and is issued by Direxion.
infoTable: Space Exploration Technologies Corp. Class A - Benchmark Price Return

data.title: An Exciting ETF for the SpaceX Trade Lifts Off
data.text: Space Exploration Technologies (SPCX), Elon Musk's rockets and satellites company, also known as SpaceX, went public last Friday in the largest initial public offering (IPO) on record.

data.title: Direxion Debuts Daily SpaceX Bull 2X ETF
data.text: On June 15, Direxion expanded its leveraged single-stock ETF lineup with the introduction of the Direxion Daily SpaceX Bull 2X ETF (LOFF). The fund has an expense ratio of 97 basis points.

data.title: These SpaceX Funds Are for Active—and Brave—Traders Only
data.text: SpaceX will be risky enough. But new ETFs that give leveraged exposure to the stock on the long or short side are on the way.
